name: Mascarpone with Wafers, Caramelised Fresh Figs & Orange Sauc
recipeInstructions:
1. For the snap mixture, process the butter, sugar, golden syrup, brandy, lemon juice, flour, and ginger powder in a food processor until smooth.
2. Process the egg white, butter, and flour in a separate food processor until smooth.
3. Mix the two processed mixtures together.
4. Spread the combined mixture thinly onto teflon biscuit trays.
5. Bake at 200°C (400°F) until golden brown.
6. Remove from oven and let cool.
7. Cut into rounds using a 10cm biscuit cutter.
8. For the figs, halve the fresh figs and sprinkle with icing sugar. Grill under high heat until caramelized.
9. To serve, sandwich two wafers with a generous amount of mascarpone between them.
10. Serve with figs and orange sauce.
